title: Reeling Scythes
description: Adds Scythes and more! Weapons meant for the Enchancement mod!
body:
![Reeling Scythes Tittle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81c3602ea386ceed911e617b33e951a25a35dc91_0.webp)
### What is Reeling Scythes about?

Reeling Scythes was originaly going to only contain scythes but it slowly branched out to contain even more weapons then originaly intended.

### What does it add?
It adds weapons such as scythes, double axes and claws with custom abilities originally made for the enchancement mod! Scythes that pull entity's closer to you, double axes with multiple sides and much more are in store for your adventures!\
For more information make sure to check out the [Wiki](https://github.com/medecoole/mod-info/wiki/Reeling-Scythes).

### Recommended mods:

Altho not necessary Reeling Scythes has always been play tested with the [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement) mod, so keep that in mind while playing.

### Skins
Now, what if you want a more *unique* scythe? Well, skins got you covered! Just Sneak and Use the Scythe on a smithing table and see your Scythe transform!

Current Skins include:
- Cake
- Bone
- Wooden
- Copper
- Carrot
- Rainbow
- ????? (secret skin)


## Make sure to Check out the Gallery for more info about the weapons!
